hero.subtitleHtml: A tradition of academic excellence, nurturing students who think boldly and act with integrity. Enrolment now open for 2026.

highlights.heading: An Education That Stays With You
highlights.intro: We believe education is more than examination results. It is character, curiosity, and the courage to lead.

cards.title: World-Class Curriculum
cards.body: A rigorous programme designed to nurture critical thinkers, equipping students for leading universities worldwide.

cards.title: A Legacy of Success
cards.body: Our students consistently rank among the top in national and international examinations, earning merit scholarships year after year.

cards.title: Holistic Environment
cards.body: From orchestra and debate to robotics and sports, our campus fosters well-rounded growth beyond the classroom.

enquiryCta.heading: Ready to Begin Your Child's Journey?
enquiryCta.body: Book a private tour, speak with our admissions team, or request our school prospectus. We'd love to meet your family.
